emails.subject: Re: deal 515363
emails.body: Re: deal 515363 Broker checked out incorrectly with Matt deal has been changed to Nevada. Kate Evelyn Metoyer@ENRON 02/07/2001 07:59 AM

emails.subject: deal 515363
emails.body: Hi Kate, For deal 515363 traded yesterday, Matt has the cp as Sierra Pacific however, Prebon has Nevada Power Company. Can you check with Matt for the correct cp name. Thanks!
